svg.text: Each KPI card has its own Stories-style progress bar at the top edge · all cards sync to the same active slice · auto-slides 6s · same component for admin/teacher/parent

g.text: Setiap kartu KPI berisi mini cycle slider sendiri. Semua kartu sinkron pada satu "active slice".
slices = anak · cycle 6s · single anak → no strip
slice = "Sekolah" tunggal · no strip · drill-down di screen lain
+ new prop: progress (0..1, segments) untuk top strip
StateNotifier yang me-rotate index tiap 6s, pause 30s saat tap
Komponen kartu sama; data slice berbeda. Backend men-emit array slices keyed by role.
Edge cases: 1 slice → strip + cycle dimatikan, kartu tampil seperti static stats card · tap kartu pause cycle 30s · scroll halaman pause cycle
